lines: Equipment Measurements & Data Requirements
Please find a list of assets from the Wok to Walk Restaurant This list is to scope out what is possible regarding data measurements

Glass Fridge Desired Measurements Real Time Energy Monitoring Consumption Technical Fault problems -Detects abnormal patterns (e.g., voltage spikes, overheating, or power interruptions). Temperature Monitoring Power Quality Analysis voltage, current, frequency, and harmonics to diagnose and prevent electrical issues .

Second Fridge Desired Measurements Real Time Energy Monitoring Consumption Technical Fault problems -Detects abnormal patterns (e.g., voltage spikes, overheating, or power interruptions). Temperature and Humidity Monitoring Power Quality Analysis voltage, current, frequency, and harmonics to diagnose and prevent electrical issues .

Freezer and Cooler Desired Measurements Real Time Energy Monitoring Consumption Technical Fault problems -Detects abnormal patterns (e.g., voltage spikes, overheating, or power interruptions). Power Quality Analysis voltage, current, frequency, and harmonics to diagnose and prevent electrical issues. Water Use (if possible, otherwise data from water meter will suffice)
Wok Stove Burner Desired Measurements Gas Use ( likely Gas Meter) Technical Fault problems -Detects abnormal patterns (e.g., voltage spikes, overheating, or power interruptions).

Dishwasher Desired Measurements Real Time Energy Monitoring Consumption Technical Fault problems -Detects abnormal patterns (e.g., voltage spikes, overheating, or power interruptions). Water Use (if possible, otherwise data from water meter will suffice)

Outside Lights Desired Measurements Real Time Energy Monitoring Consumption Technical Fault problems -Detects abnormal patterns (e.g., voltage spikes, overheating, or power interruptions). Temperature and Humidity Monitoring Power Quality Analysis voltage, current, frequency, and harmonics to diagnose and prevent electrical issues.
Tap Desired Measurements Water Use/ Flow (if possible, otherwise data from water meter will suffice ) Leak Detection

Conclusion for data task The collection of data from all electrical equipment including from lights and HVAC systems is desired to assist the day-to-day functioning of the Wok to Walk restaurants It is hoped that this data should also provide an ability for Wok to Walk members to receive a notifications regarding the equipment in the restaurant e.g. fault detection, leak detection or whether certain changes need to take place to maintain equipment functioning to its optimal position.
